notes:
v0.8.2 Update
- Improved Currency Definitions Embedded Item actor scan results with search, a live count, a filtered empty state, and a scrollable list for actors with many item-based currency candidates.

announcement.title: 🔔 GlitchSmith Library v0.8.2
announcement.content:
GlitchSmith Library v0.8.2 improves the Currency Definitions dialog.

  • Embedded Item actor scan results now include search, a live result count, and a no-match state.
  • The candidate list is capped with its own scrollbar, so actors with many item-based currencies no longer stretch the dialog.
